product_title: TP-Link Archer C50 AC1200 Wireless Dual Band Router
description: High-speed TP-Link Archer C50 AC1200 dual-band WiFi router designed for smooth streaming, gaming, video calls, and multi-device home networking with reliable coverage and stable performance.

faqs.question: Does this router support dual-band WiFi?
faqs.answer: Yes, it supports both 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands.

faqs.question: Is this router suitable for gaming and streaming?
faqs.answer: Yes, AC1200 speed is suitable for HD streaming and online gaming.

faqs.question: Can multiple devices connect at the same time?
faqs.answer: Yes, the router supports multiple connected devices efficiently.

faqs.question: Does it work with fiber broadband connections?
faqs.answer: Yes, it supports broadband and fiber internet setups.
